message:
fix(fwc): use Validation exit code for validate command failures and add invalid-input tests

Replace CliExitCode::UnknownCommand with CliExitCode::Validation in
validate_dispatch and validate_dispatch_host when input is missing or
validation fails. UnknownCommand was semantically wrong for validation
errors — these are user-input problems, not unrecognized commands.

Add two new tests (offline and host-backed) that exercise the validate
command with incomplete input and assert the Validation exit code plus
error_count >= 1. Also includes minor rustfmt reformatting of test
assertions and function signatures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
